summary: Iteration 7: Tested FY filtering, Cash Opening Balance, and Party Opening Balance features. Fixed critical backend bug where /api/cashbook/opening-balance was being caught by /api/cashbook/{date} route. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 navigation tabs working. Frontend UI verified for FY selector, P&L Monthly/FY toggle, Cash Book Opening Balance modal, and Party Ledger Edit Opening Balance modal.

fixed.issue: Route was being caught by /api/cashbook/{date} due to FastAPI route ordering
fixed.fix: Moved opening-balance routes BEFORE the {date} route in server.py

passed_tests: GET /api/cashbook/opening-balance - Returns opening_balance and as_on_date
POST /api/cashbook/opening-balance - Sets cash opening balance with persistence
GET /api/financial-years - Returns list of financial years
GET /api/financial-years/active - Returns active FY with id, name, start_date, end_date
GET /api/reports/simple-profit-loss - All time P&L
GET /api/reports/simple-profit-loss?month=2026-01 - Month filtered P&L
GET /api/reports/simple-profit-loss?fy={fy_id} - FY filtered P&L with period label
GET /api/reports/simple-balance-sheet - All time Balance Sheet
GET /api/reports/simple-balance-sheet?fy={fy_id} - FY filtered Balance Sheet
Balance Sheet cash_balance includes opening balance
POST /api/parties - Create party with opening_balance
PUT /api/parties/{id} - Update party opening_balance with persistence
FY Selector in Header - Dropdown shows financial years
P&L Page - Monthly/Financial Year toggle buttons working
P&L Page - FY filter dropdown shows financial years
Cash Book - Opening Balance button opens modal
Cash Book - Opening Balance modal has date and amount inputs
Party Ledger - Edit Opening Balance icon opens modal
Party Ledger - Edit Opening Balance modal shows party name and current balance
All 12 navigation tabs working (Dashboard, Staff, Attendance, Salary, Cash Book, Party Ledger, Byaj, Expenses, Reports, Chit Fund, P&L, Balance Sheet)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: FastAPI route ordering issue - specific routes like /cashbook/opening-balance must be defined BEFORE parameterized routes like /cashbook/{date}
FY filtering correctly uses date range from financial_years collection
Cash Opening Balance stored in settings collection with key 'cash_opening_balance'
Balance Sheet correctly includes cash_opening_balance in cash_balance calculation
Hindi/Hinglish labels working throughout the app
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FY filtering and Opening Balance features fully tested. Backend route ordering bug fixed (opening-balance routes moved before {date} route). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_fy_opening_balance.py covers: Cash Opening Balance APIs, Financial Year APIs, P&L with FY filter, Balance Sheet with FY filter, Party Opening Balance update. All 12 navigation tabs verified working.

bug_fixed.description: FastAPI route ordering bug - /api/cashbook/opening-balance was being caught by /api/cashbook/{date}
bug_fixed.root_cause: In FastAPI, routes are matched in order of definition. The parameterized route /cashbook/{date} was defined before /cashbook/opening-balance, so 'opening-balance' was being treated as a date parameter.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Moved /cashbook/opening-balance routes BEFORE /cashbook/{date} route in server.py (lines 963-980)
bug_fixed.verification: API now returns correct response: {opening_balance: 100000, as_on_date: '2025-04-01'}
